creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
It looks like firefox-113.0_1,2 has made some changes to ${WRKSRC}/modules/libpref/Preferences.cpp, but they do not seem to fix this problem.
Turning off SNDIO and ALSA option, or building with patch-modules_libpref_Preferences.cpp from attachment 241608 in www/firefox/files directory, is still a valid way to get oss to choose.
